name: run-analyze-optimize-skill
description: Lightweight autonomous run-analyze-optimize loop for command-driven debugging, minimal fixes, verification, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Run, diagnose, minimally fix, verify, and review.
interface.longDescription: A compact self-iteration workflow for command-driven debugging and artifact convergence. It combines Karpathy-style simplicity and surgical edits with Roundtable-lite evidence and review discipline.
defaultPrompt: Run tests, diagnose failures, and fix minimally.
Iterate a pipeline until artifacts verify.
Review the diff and preserve dissent.
